characters.name: The Rapist Defender
characters.description: Big Bad: Of Season 2, being the main obstacle between Clay and his friends getting justice for Hannah's suicide, even moreso than Bryce himself. Blackmail: They send numerous people threatening notes that tell them to keep their mouths shut during the trial,or else. Broken-Window Warning: They throw a brick through Mr. Porter's car window to intimidate him into silence. Car Fu: They attempt to run Clay off the road with Bryce's car, implicitly trying tooutright killhim, knowing that he's the biggest threat to their plan. Dead Animal Warning: They put a dead rat in Zach's gym bag to scare him into submission.
